source_intake_record.raw_question_text: In the quadrilateral $P Q R S$, the length of $P Q$ is $11 \mathrm{~cm}$, the length of $Q R$ is $7 \mathrm{~cm}$, the length of $R S$ is $9 \mathrm{~cm}$ and the length of $S P$ is $3 \mathrm{~cm}$. Both $\angle Q R S$ and $\angle S P Q$ are $90^{\circ}$. What is the area of the quadrilateral $P Q R S$ ? <image1>
